evals.prompt: I run an online jewelry store, AOV around 8000–15000. I get traffic from Xiaohongshu and Douyin to a single-product PDP. The main issue: lots of saves and add-to-cart, but very few click ‘consult CS’ or leave contact. Use your high-ticket trust skill to diagnose where the problem is and give me a 30-day improvement plan.
evals.expected_output: A full diagnosis and plan for high-ticket jewelry: at least summary (3–5 points), decision-path diagnosis (touch to close), trust asset audit (have vs missing), PDP redesign checklist and module suggestions, inquiry copy and SOP examples, 7–30 day lead nurture rhythm, key metrics, and 2–4 week execution schedule.

evals.prompt: I do premium whole-home custom, mainly offline, AOV 100k–300k. Online we have a site + WeChat consultation; users usually leave phone and floor plan first, then an advisor calls. Problem: decent lead volume but low conversion from lead to site visit / home measure. Many leads sound very guarded on the phone. Based on this, assess our trust and communication gaps and give a plan to improve landing page + advisor copy + follow-up rhythm.
evals.expected_output: A plan for premium custom home: decision-path from first site visit to booking, trust asset audit (store, factory, cases, build standards), landing and form checklist and redesign ideas, structured advisor copy for first touch and quote, multi-touch (7–30 day) follow-up table, and measurable process and outcome metrics.

evals.prompt: I’m running online ads for a medical beauty clinic, main offer 10k–30k anti-aging. CTR from ad to landing is OK, but very few leave WeChat/phone. Many who add WeChat don’t reply for a long time. From a high-ticket, long-decision view: 1) Diagnose the most likely missing trust points; 2) Give landing content structure + risk and guarantee + objection copy; 3) Design at least a 14-day owned-channel cadence (content themes and segments).
evals.expected_output: A plan for medical beauty anti-aging: summary, consideration-journey from ad to clinic visit, trust asset list and gaps (credentials, experts, cases, risk, repeat/referral), landing module sketch and key copy, common objection bank with structured replies, and 14-day owned-channel touchpoint table by time and intent.

evals.prompt: I sell premium online training, AOV 15k–30k, program over 6 months. We get a fair number of leads, but sales say many say ‘I’ll think about it’ or ‘need to discuss with family’ and then go silent. Use your high-ticket trust skill to break down gaps in ‘trust assets not specific enough,’ ‘price and value unclear,’ and ‘multi-party decision,’ and output a full sales/CS SOP and copy framework to improve inquiry-to-close.
evals.expected_output: A plan for high-ticket training: decision-path and main hesitation points, trust asset audit and fill-ins (instructor, past students, results, learning support), steps and copy examples for first inquiry → offer → quote → objections → close, structured reply templates for ‘discuss with family / think more,’ and a 2–4 week training and execution plan.
